title: onosma intertexta
intro: Onosma intertexta, also known as Golden Milk-vetch, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and act as an antioxidant. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially treating certain types of cancer. Golden Milk-vetch can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
